publication_rule: No item may move to published until its content, safety, source, link, SEO, build, browser, accessibility and production checks pass, the change is merged to main, GitHub Pages succeeds, and deployment.json plus live files match the merged SHA.

publishers.next_action: Rebuild the rights and validity inventory from latest main; do not publish any test lacking origin, rights, scoring provenance, Arabic validation and privacy review.
Rebuild the local mood and sleep tracker from latest main and retain non-diagnostic interpretation, local storage controls, export and deletion tests.
Preserve the postpartum research package but do not wire or publish until specialist review is evidenced and all current-main gates pass.
Rebuild the school-anxiety guide from latest main after child-safeguarding and specialist review; keep medical and bullying differentials explicit.
Run a duplicate and evidence gap audit against the official Arabic-English terminology registry before selecting a new term. This audit may advance without publishing health claims.
Rebuild the first-session preparation guide from latest main; separate logistical preparation from clinical advice and require current privacy and emergency boundaries.
Keep the anxiety Q&A built-not-published until specialist review and a fresh current-main validation run succeed.
Replace overlapping anxiety article branches with one current-main branch after deciding canonical ownership and securing required review.
Rebuild the family communication workbook from latest main as a non-diagnostic educational resource with safeguarding, print, accessibility and source tests.
Do not publish the home-school neurodevelopmental plan until external review; continue only dignity, accessibility and safeguarding checks that make no clinical claims.

safe_parallel_work: Publisher 05: dictionary duplicate and evidence gap audit

notes: This ledger records operational readiness only. It does not prove scientific review, publication or live deployment.
